intro.title: THE LUXURY OF BEING YOURSELF
intro.desc: At Haircut Day, we believe that beauty is an extension of your personality. A space designed to offer more than just a service: a sensory experience that combines the latest trends with maximum care and exclusivity.

footer.brandDesc: Your trusted salon in Barcelona. Where style and exclusivity meet.

estetica.title: AESTHETICS
estetica.subtitle: An Aesthetics Center in Barcelona Designed for You
estetica.desc: In our aesthetics salon in Barcelona you will find the most innovative treatments by expert professionals in skin and body care.

services.title: MANICURE AND PEDICURE
services.description: Complete treatments for your hands and feet. Traditional or permanent enamelling with the best brands.

services.title: INDIBA DEEP BEAUTY
services.description: Radiofrequency technology for facial and body rejuvenation. Visible results from the first session.

services.title: FACIAL CLEANSING
services.description: Personalized facial treatments to hydrate, illuminate and oxygenate your skin.

services.title: MICROBLADING
services.description: Eyebrow design hair by hair for a perfect and natural look.

peluqueria.title: HAIRDRESSING
peluqueria.subtitle: AT HAIRCUTDAY WE ARE ONE OF THE BEST HAIRDRESSERS IN BARCELONA
peluqueria.desc: Discover why our clients place us among the best hairdressers in Barcelona. A passionate team, elite products and an environment designed for your relaxation.

services.title: HAIRCUT
services.description: Transform your style with our haircut experts. We design the look that best suits your features.

services.title: ARTISTIC COLORING
services.description: Balayage, Babylights or solid colors. We use high-end products such as L’Oréal and Kérastase.

services.title: EXTENSIONS
services.description: Provide volume and length with our highest quality natural hair extensions.

services.title: KERATIN AND STRAIGHTENING
services.description: Eliminate frizz and achieve silky, shiny hair with our straightening treatments.

experiencias.title: EXPERIENCES
experiencias.subtitle: ENJOY A TOTALLY PERSONALIZED BEAUTY EXPERIENCE IN BARCELONA
experiencias.desc: At Hair Cut Day Barcelona we believe that personal care is a holistic experience. Our experiences are designed for give as a gift or to treat yourself to a moment of absolute disconnection.

blocks.title: YOUR NEW STYLE
blocks.text: Image design and transformation. A change of look advised by our best stylists.

blocks.title: PREMIUM EXPERIENCE
blocks.text: A complete beauty voucher that includes hair treatment, manicure and facial massage.

blocks.title: EXPERIENCES FOR BRIDES
blocks.text: Exclusive hair and makeup pack so you shine on your most special day.

posts.title: OLAPLEX BARCELONA: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW
posts.excerpt: Discover the treatment that has revolutionized the care of damaged hair.

posts.title: CAPILLARY PROSTHESES: THE DEFINITIVE SOLUTION
posts.excerpt: We talk about how to recover hair density naturally.

posts.title: HAIRCUT TRENDS FOR THIS SUMMER
posts.excerpt: From the classic Bob to the most avant-garde styles.

contacto.title: CONTACT
contacto.subtitle: WE ARE AT YOUR DISPOSAL, SHALL WE TALK?
